info.name: ERP System API
info.description:
Complete API collection for ERP System - erp-security module

📦 Modules Covered:
- Authentication (login, refresh, logout)
- User Management (CRUD, roles, search)
- Role Management (CRUD, toggle active, pages, copy permissions)
- Permission Management (create, list)
- Pages Registry (CRUD, activate, deactivate)
- Menu Management (user menu)

🔥 v3.0.0 - Full erp-security coverage:
- Added login-token endpoint (returns full user info)
- Added GET /users/{userId} endpoint
- Added PUT /users/{userId} endpoint
- Added DELETE /users/{userId} endpoint
- Added GET /roles/{roleId} endpoint
- Added PUT /roles/{roleId} endpoint
- Added PUT /roles/{roleId}/toggle-active endpoint
- Added POST /roles/{roleId}/copy-from/{sourceRoleId} endpoint
- Updated Role→Pages endpoints to match actual implementation
- Menu endpoints simplified (SEC_MENU_ITEM removed)

item.name: Authentication
item.description: APIs for user authentication and token management

request.description: Authenticates user and returns JWT access token. Use this token in the Authorize button above.
Authenticates user and returns access token, refresh token, and complete user information including roles and permissions. Recommended for frontend login.
Refreshes the access token using the refresh token cookie
Logs out the user and invalidates all tokens

item.name: User Management
item.description: APIs for managing users, roles, and permissions

query.description: Sort: fieldName,direction. Fields: id, username, enabled, createdAt, updatedAt

request.description: Get paginated list of users for current tenant
Create a new user with username and password
Update user information (username, password, enabled status). All fields are optional.
Delete a user if they have no child relationships (e.g., active refresh tokens)
Assign roles to a user (FULL_REPLACE mode - removes existing roles and assigns new ones)

exec: pm.test("Response is array of strings", function () {

request.description: Get list of role names assigned to user. Returns: ["ROLE_ADMIN", "ROLE_USER"]

Advanced user search with dynamic filters.

Allowed Fields: id, username, enabled, createdAt, tenantId

Operators: EQ, NE, GT, GE, LT, LE, LIKE, IN, IS_NULL, IS_NOT_NULL, BETWEEN

query.description: Sort: fieldName,direction. Fields: id, name, createdAt, updatedAt

request.description: Get paginated list of roles for current tenant
Retrieve a single role by its ID
Create a new role (permissions assigned via /pages endpoints)
Update an existing role's basic information
Enable or disable a role
Delete a role permanently

item.name: Role → Pages RBAC
item.description: Role-Based Access Control for Pages (Master/Detail relationship)

exec: pm.test("Each page has CRUD flags", function () {

request.description: Get list of assigned pages for this role with CRUD permission flags (create, update, delete). VIEW is always implicit.

exec: pm.test("Page added to role successfully", function () {

request.description: Add a page to a role with specific CRUD permissions. VIEW is ALWAYS added automatically. Use permissions: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE
SYNC MODE: Replace ALL page assignments for this role. Every listed page MUST keep VIEW. CRUD permissions must match exactly the request.

exec: pm.test("Page removed from role successfully", function () {

request.description: Remove a page from the role completely (removes VIEW + CREATE + UPDATE + DELETE for that page)
Copy all pages and CRUD permissions from source role. VIEW is auto-added. Existing assignments may be replaced (SYNC).

query.description: Sort: fieldName,direction. Fields: id, name, module, createdAt, updatedAt

request.description: Get paginated list of permissions for current tenant
Create a new permission manually. Note: Permissions are auto-generated when creating Pages.

item.name: Pages Registry
item.description: إدارة الصفحات (Pages/Screens) - Each page auto-generates 4 CRUD permissions

query.description: Filter by module name (e.g., SECURITY, FINANCE)
Search keyword for page names (Arabic/English) or code

request.description: Get paginated list of pages with optional filters (module, active status, search keyword)
Get all active pages for dropdowns (used in Role Access Control 'Add Page' dropdown)
Retrieve a single page by its ID
Register a new page/screen and auto-generate 4 CRUD permissions (PERM_{CODE}_VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE)
Update an existing page (pageCode cannot be changed)
Deactivate a page (soft delete - sets active = false)
Reactivate a previously deactivated page (sets active = true)

item.name: Menu Management
item.description: APIs for user menu retrieval based on permissions

exec: pm.test("Menu items have required fields", function () {

request.description: Returns menu tree structure for current logged-in user. Shows only pages where user has VIEW permission. Called immediately after login to build Angular menu.

item.name: Get User Menu (By User ID - Admin)

request.description: Admin: View menu structure for any user. Useful for debugging permission issues.
